summary: Added SetCondition and GetCondition functions to the conditions package, completing the 4-function API (SetCondition, GetCondition, IsReady, AllTrue). Both functions delegate to k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta helpers. Comprehensive table-driven tests added for both functions covering empty slices, updates, nil/empty inputs, and multi-condition lookups. All 4 functions now have 100% test coverage.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (nil, empty, missing type, multiple conditions)
Table-driven test structure with descriptive names

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (Gomega dot-import, NewGomegaWithT)
No dead code or unnecessary complexity

security_checklist.item: No user input handling (pure wrappers around apimachinery)
No Kubernetes API calls (pure functions only)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible (thin wrappers)
Correct delegation to meta.SetStatusCondition and meta.FindStatusCondition

fail_fast_checklist.item: Functions delegate directly to apimachinery — no error swallowing

defensive_checklist.item: Nil/empty condition slices handled correctly by delegated functions

metadata.title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages
